projects.name: Validate Karbon_entities Table
projects.notes: Cleared ~5k records. Daniel re-running analysis. Waiting to get confirmation on if we can activate the syncing of certain contact types from Karbon to NetSuite. Also waiting for Daniel to get back in office Mon 3/2.

projects.name: Update Core client_subsidiary Model
projects.notes: Confirmed table logic with Tyson. The table should increase by rows for every client_subsidiary relationship. Additionally we will bring in the leadership_position_3 and leadership_position_4 fields from kpi_dimn_client to represent the CAS client owner and manager. We are holding off on adding operational logic around forcing the use of client owner/manager fields and CAS fields between office 3 and local offices.

projects.name: Update Master Office Mapping
projects.notes: Updating model in dbt. Identified that cohort details can be merged into the subsidiary table to easily flow into reporting and analytic models. The office mapping table needs to live at the stage level and use the netsuite table as left and join in to the karbon_entities table to always have an updated NS <> KB office table. The new API table works well, and now I'll need to create two lookup tables. One for each direction.

projects.name: PowerBI Bug: Brett M Contreras WIP (Amber)
projects.notes: Client showing high $6.6k WIP, but other details point to only $170. For the WIP discrepancy issue, I found this week that it's not isolated to Meridian. I was in PFOA's Client KPI report and it lists Henry A. and Katherine N. Azaria as having 73k in WIP. I caught my attention because this is their biggest client and he left EOY. I checked and saw a few hours as they're working with his new BM company to help set things up but not sure what's feeding into that full amount.

projects.name: Office Mapping - Hulquist
projects.notes: Connect the new acquisition's netsuite instance to the karbon instance in our database. Confirm the NetSuite database contains the office and note the Subsidiary Name and Subsidiary ID. Confirm the KPI database contains the office and note the Account Name and Account ID. (This requires reaching out to Karbon to ensure they add the office). Finally confirm HR has created the new Department Description. When all of these conditions exist and are met, we can connect the data

projects.name: Data Request for Tyson - HDI Master Production File
projects.notes: Compile all clean production data from HDI extracts into one master Excel file.

projects.name: Platform Connect Data Analysis Request
projects.notes: Analyze capacity planning / hours worked within certain service line segments across all of Platform to see where there are areas to consolidate service lines and mitigate key-person risk. Would need all Platform offices using Karbon, that were tracking work from 1/1/25 to 12/31/25. Team message includes data points requested.

projects.name: Client Owner Returns Data Request
projects.notes: Show the number of returns someone was a client owner of, John Bostwick, in 2025 where John was the only person who tracked time to it. This is a gauge on how well someone might be involving others in getting their work done, and preparing for it to be transitioned to someone new. Use a measure like this to challenge those members of the team that are outgoing via retirement to share a greater portion of their book with other members.

completed.name: PowerBI Bug: Sarah Lippled Client Owner (Amber)
completed.impact: Sarah Lippled showing as client_owner on KPI report under Meridian, but she is not in that firm. Root cause: mismatching keys between the vw_fact_sales_reward table and the dim_subsidiary table because the PowerBI semantic model was pulling dim_subsidiary from sandbox but the actual vw_fact_sales_reward table was internally joining to dim_subsidiary in analytics causing mismatched keys.
